data.title: Winnebago Industries Q4 Results Miss Estimates, Stock Dips On Soft Outlook
data.description: Winnebago Industries' Q4 results miss estimates with adjusted EPS at 28 cents and earnings outlook softer than estimates for fiscal 2025, causing stock decline.
